What is the average turnaround time by t:
gate_assignments
| summarize avg_turnaround = round(avg(turnaround_minutes), 1) by terminal
| order by terminal asc
Which gates are the busiest?:
gate_assignments
| summarize assignments = count() by gate, terminal
| order by assignments desc
| take 10
How many gate assignments were delayed o:
gate_assignments
| summarize count() by status
| order by count_ desc
Which crew members flew the most flights:
crew_rosters
| where role == "captain"
| summarize flights = dcount(flight_id) by crew_name, crew_member_id
| order by flights desc
| take 10
What is the crew nationality distributio:
crew_rosters
| summarize crew_count = dcount(crew_member_id) by nationality
| order by crew_count desc
How many crew members are based at each:
crew_rosters
| summarize crew_count = dcount(crew_member_id) by base_airport
| order by crew_count desc
| take 10
Show the monthly distribution of mainten:
maintenance_events
| extend month = startofmonth(start_datetime)
| summarize events = count(), avg_duration = round(avg(duration_hours), 1) by month
| order by month asc
Which aircraft types have the most unsch:
maintenance_events
| where event_type == "unscheduled"
| summarize events = count(), avg_hours = round(avg(duration_hours), 1) by aircraft_type
| order by events desc
| take 10
What is the breakdown of maintenance cat:
maintenance_events
| summarize events = count(), avg_hours = round(avg(duration_hours), 1) by category
| order by events desc
How many AOG (Aircraft on Ground) events:
maintenance_events
| where event_type == "aog"
| summarize events = count(), total_hours = round(sum(duration_hours), 0) by aircraft_type
| order by events desc
How many maintenance events are linked t:
maintenance_events
| summarize total = count(), linked = countif(isnotnull(related_flight_id)), unlinked = countif(isnull(related_flight_id))
What is the unresolved maintenance event:
maintenance_events
| where resolved == false
| summarize unresolved = count() by category, event_type
| order by unresolved desc
